name: API Key MCP Fixture
description: A test-only API-key provider with secure server-side storage, one read-only MCP-compatible tool, and its own skill.

capabilities.description: Use a submitted server-side API key to read deterministic, sanitized fixture data.

tools.name: fixture.api-key.read
tools.description: Return deterministic data through a secret-backed read-only tool.

skills.name: authenticated-mcp-fixture
skills.description: Verify a plugin-owned skill can call a secret-backed MCP-compatible tool.
